top_signals.title: Key Japanese Aluminum Fee Set for Record as War Squeezes Supply
top_signals.summary: Rio Tinto Group and South32 Ltd. have offered Japanese clients third-quarter aluminum supply at record premiums, said traders familiar with the matter, after conflict in the Middle East tightened the global market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Exxon warns oil inventories will hit dangerously low levels in weeks, forcing prices to shoot higher
top_signals.summary: The price of physical Brent oil cargoes will spike to $150 to $160 per barrel once inventories hit all-time lows, Exxon executive Neil Chapman said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: US Stocks Extend Highs as Traders Await Iran Deal: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: US stocks modestly extended all-time highs as traders waited to see whether America and Iran could finally get a peace deal across the line and restore oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Taiwan Sees AI Thrusting Exports to Fastest Growth in 50 Years
top_signals.summary: Taiwan revised up its economic growth forecast for this year, predicting that roaring demand for AI would send exports to the best performance in five decades.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Canada wants Saab early-warning aircraft under push to retool defense suppliers
top_signals.summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney has pledged to diversify and localize defense production following continued threats by U.S. President Trump.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Spurning just war, Pope Leo ends Catholic 'permission slip' for conflicts - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Spurning just war, Pope Leo ends Catholic 'permission slip' for conflicts  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: KPMG Australia boss resigns amid whistleblower scandal
top_signals.summary: The boss of KPMG Australia has resigned after the firm admitted to severely mishandling a whistleblower report on client confidentiality breaches. The scandal was prompted by a whistleblower who alleged that client documents were inappropriately shared with the senior leadership team, including the chief executive, which prompted an internal investigation. But the investigation did not [...]
